title: Simplified Chow Fun Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Chinese-inspired stir fry dish made with fun noodles, vegetables, and a flavorful sauce.
instructions: Cook the fun noodles according to package instructions.
Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced cabbage and carrots and cook until they start to soften.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir in the chow sauce, soy sauce, and rice vinegar.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Continue cooking for 2-3 minutes, until the noodles are well coated with the sauce.
